ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the the Ricovrati in 1619, where he was `consigliere` and music superintendent. He was also part of the Accademia degli Zitoclei, and, according to Maylender, hosted the meetings of the Accademia degli Anelanti.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
